horoscope: Power games are possible today, dear Aries, and this potential is stronger if there are insecurities and fears involved. It will be difficult to truly know others’ agendas unless you look hard, as people are not very direct or forthcoming at the moment. Your aura could be a little heavy if you let worries take up too much space in your mind. This is not the best time to make a case. There can be sensitivity and resistance now. Ride it out. Fortunately, doing your share feels good today, and focusing on stabilizing your social life or handling outstanding or unresolved issues related to friends or projects can lead to good things.

The Moon spends another day in your resources sector, dear Taurus, and you pay particular attention to what makes you feel most comfortable. You're establishing your needs and wants and exploring ways to satisfy them at this time of the lunar month. Progress on your larger goals can be particularly satisfying right now, and fortunately, transits support finding new methods to advance. However, watch for hidden agendas, without taking it to paranoid levels. People are not very inclined to put their cards on the table at the moment. Relationship or money concerns and worries could be a problem now. Generally speaking, you could be a little more suspicious or think in darker terms. Watch for mental circling or obsessive thinking and avoid power games with co-workers and friends. On this day before Mercury's retrograde begins, it makes sense to watch for making big decisions and statements.

Tensions are very possible today, dear Gemini, although they're minor enough to turn around. Any conflicts that may arise can serve as a push to make important changes. For one, you need more "me time," especially after much attention to your outside responsibilities. For another, resentment eats away at us, so aim to address the kinds of negative feelings you may have been nurturing recently. Fortunately, today holds good energy for arriving at an understanding with someone or about a long-standing problem. You persevere through problem areas that may have prevented you from moving on and expressing yourself authentically. You're likely to feel stronger as you learn valuable skills. You are a little braver than usual, particularly for entertaining new concepts and ideas or expressing your feelings. With Mercury about to turn retrograde, it's best to hold off on the bigger decisions nevertheless.

What people are saying and discussing may only be scratching the surface at times today, dear Cancer, as it's rather easy for you to see that there can be hidden agendas or issues of power and control at play. Nursing resentments is a possibility now, but if you just can't let something go, even knowing that if you did, you'd be better off for it, then it may be worth a second look. Apply the same insight you have for others' dramas to yourself, and dig a little deeper. With today's Moon, you'll have all the tools at your disposal to do so. Taking a step back from the world in some meaningful way can be appropriate and replenishing. It's a good time to catch your breath, as you may need a little more time to yourself than usual. You might crave release from overstimulation.

The Moon spends another day in your social sector, dear Leo, and it's a good time of the lunar month to seek inspiration. It remains important not to take on too much, as tempting as it may be, with new ventures, ideas, or connections with friends and networking. The feeling of being on top of things is most rewarding right now. Transits today are strong for solving a problem or coming up with a clever idea, particularly on practical levels. Still, there can be some heaviness to the atmosphere around you at times, especially in close relationships. Nobody seems to want to give a little, and this can lead to a stand-off or backing off. A losing strategy today would be to expect others to intuit what you want or need. Being straightforward may be the way to go, or simply holding onto that thought and waiting for a better time to pursue your interests may be best. Be selective about what kinds of thoughts you allow to rent space in your head today – it's your head, and overloading it with negativity will only make you suffer.

You feel more confident today when you get in better touch with your goals, dear Virgo. Going your own way in your work or with your routines is satisfying. You're also in good shape to boost your skills or improve your health, as you can feel genuinely dedicated to these things. Still, it can be too easy to get worked up over matters that on another day wouldn't faze you. It's not worth the strain, of course, unless it motivates you to fix problems. Tensions may be a symptom of something deeper or of unresolved issues, likely related to close relationships. What likely needs changing is a partnership or related patterns that are not serving you well.

The Moon harmonizes with Mars today, dear Libra, and both bodies are in harmony with your sign, serving as a nice energetic boost. You're in touch with your instincts and expressing yourself more naturally, even with Mercury about to turn retrograde. You could feel a stronger desire for movement or variety. There could be disagreements over basic values today, however, and possibly about how money is spent. Others may seem rather wayward with money or borrowed items, and this can frustrate you now. It’s not the best time to lend something out or even to collect on a loan, although if it’s bothering you, it’s not something to dismiss. There can be worries or fears of betrayal in relationships, but be careful not to allow them to drive behavior. Be selective about what you allow to take center stage in your mind.

Today's energies are good for keeping busy, dear Scorpio, even with a somewhat retiring disposition due to the Moon's all-day transit of your solar eighth house. You might actively work at improving your home life or your feelings of security and comfort, which is satisfying. You feel more emotionally fulfilled when you apply yourself to something that elevates your life right now. Still, tension is possible if you feel stuck in the middle of others’ conflicts, without much hope for coming to a definite conclusion now. With the extremes you feel and see now, coming to the middle ground may be your best bet. Avoid over-analyzing your relationships, as it can take you into tricky territory.

Transits today support sharing and connecting, dear Sagittarius, as well as enthusiasm for your interests and projects. With the Moon again in your partnership sector all day, you're more interactive and interested in feedback. You might watch for putting too much attention, time, or energy into a relationship at the expense of other life departments. Putting too much weight in others' opinions can also be a stumbling block today. Leaving your ego at the door can be very hard to do at times, as you can be especially sensitive to any matter that involves an imbalance of power. It’s not an ideal time for gaining an edge, as you are likely to feel that if you push too hard, you wind up at square one, or worse. You tend to analyze and possibly over-analyze matters today. Love right now can be complicated, and you could be feeling unusual desires and impulses. Otherwise, with the right balance, it's a good time for bonding.

Money and basic values can be challenging topics that you may want to sidestep today, dear Capricorn. However, if you’re trying to get to the root of a problem, you might address it, but save important decision-making for a time when you’re more impartial. You might choose to right a wrong instead, for example. Even if it’s a small effort, it’s still an empowering one. Fortunately, today's transits are good for feeling stronger for your self-improvement efforts. It's easier to see what needs improvement with your habits, daily life, and wellness. It may not always be easy to focus today, but you can move mountains once you find your passion. In fact, feeling on top of your practical affairs can be the key to freeing yourself up emotionally today.

Watch for power games today, dear Aquarius. Love matters may be complicated or unstable just for now. With money, it can be difficult to be objective, as worry or fear can temporarily interfere with judgment. Try not to let impulses control your day, and be sure to avoid confusing drama with happiness in your social or love life. Enjoy the moments and own your feelings for the best results. While you may be dealing with inner restlessness today, the enthusiasm you express tends to inspire others to follow suit. People in your life are more likely to appreciate your unique vision and perspective. Following a passion or a new interest can be exciting.

You may be feeling frustrated and sensitive to interruptions, disturbances, and difficult people at times today, dear Pisces. There can be double meanings in conversations today, and a sense that it wouldn’t take much to provoke others. Avoid letting problems hang heavy in your aura or in the air around you by resolving matters before they mushroom. In all likelihood, simply communicating clearly and openly can prevent all sorts of problems today. This can be a tall order on this day before Mercury turns retrograde, but with some care, it's doable. The Moon is pulling you into yourself today, and your need for security and comfort is more pronounced.
